## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I have reviewed my own code before submitting.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally.
- [ ] My code follows the SylvenOS coding standards.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where necessary.
- [ ] I have verified that my changes introduce no new warnings or errors.
- [ ] My contribution is focused and reasonably scoped.
- [ ] I have linked the related issue (if applicable).

## About SylvenOS

SylvenOS-Web is a community-driven open-source project focused on building a modern, collaborative ecosystem.

Please:

- Keep pull requests focused and reviewable.
- Follow project conventions and contribution guidelines.
- Be respectful during code reviews and discussions.
- Help maintain a high-quality contributor experience.

Thank you for contributing to SylvenOS 🚀
